signupData.goalsElaboration: Hypertrophy focused - want to gain 15 more lbs of muscle. Former skinny guy, dedicated to getting bigger and stronger. Increase main lifts, look more athletic. Long-term 6-8 month timeline.
signupData.experienceElaboration: 18 months of consistent training. Started at 145 lb, now 165 lb. Eating in surplus. Enjoys tracking progressive overload and hitting PRs. Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri/Sat at 6 PM, 75 min sessions.

onboardingMessages: I'm focused on gaining muscle - I've gone from 145 to 165 lb in 18 months and want to put on another 15 lbs.
I go to a commercial gym with full equipment, 5 days a week. Bench 185x5, squat 225x5, deadlift 275x5.
I love tracking everything and hitting PRs. I'm eating in a surplus and just want to get bigger and stronger. No injuries.
